FLASHMANIA

A Sonic & Physics-Based Time Trial Experience

🔊 This game relies heavily on real-time synthesized 3D audio cues.

  • Engine pitches rise as your speed builds.
  • Drifts produce aggressive high-frequency friction screeches.
  • Under-tire acoustics shift dynamically between premium asphalt hums, crunchy gravel (dirt), smooth silent-ice slides, and hollow wet plastic.

FLASHMANIA

CHASING MILLISECONDS • SOLO TIME TRIAL • PURE PHYSICS

SELECT TRACK

TRACK DATA

Select a track from the left to view metrics, targets & medals.

CREATOR ZONE

Design your own track using our Lego-style modular block system. Share or test your creations instantly!

KINESTHETICS & CONTROLS

Accelerate: W or ↑
Steer: A/D or ←/→
Brake / Reverse: S or ↓
Drift (Sharp asphalt curves): Tap Space or down axis while steering at speed
Air Control: Tap S (Brakes) in mid-air to nose-dive car & land sooner to accelerate!
Quick Respawn: Backspace / Delete / Enter (Instant restart to chase performance)
